parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'valide' THEN 1 END) as valides, MAX(date_generation) as dernier_fec FROM fichiers_fec WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'signe' THEN 1 END) as signes FROM factures_electroniques WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'transmis' THEN 1 END) as transmis FROM e_reportings WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'transmise' THEN 1 END) as transmises FROM edi_tva WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'transmise' THEN 1 END) as transmises FROM declarations_das2 WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN date_expiration < NOW() THEN 1 END) as expires FROM archives_comptables WHERE tenant_id = $1
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'ouverte' THEN 1 END) as ouvertes, COUNT(CASE WHEN statut = 'fermee' THEN 1 END) as fermees FROM periodes_comptables WHERE tenant_id = $1

parameters.text:
📊 Dashboard Conformité France
Vue d'ensemble de toutes les obligations:
- FEC, Factur-X, E-Reporting, EDI-TVA
- DAS2, Archives, Périodes
Score de conformité calculé (0-100)
Alertes pour obligations manquantes
